title: 8 Ways a Man of God Goes First
caption:
Real leadership always goes first.

Not first into the spotlight. First into the cost.

He apologizes before anyone asks. He serves before he's announced. He has the hard conversation before it becomes a crisis. He puts his phone down before anyone else does.

This is what it looks like when a man actually leads — at the table, in the friendship, in the relationship, at work.

Christ went first into death so we didn't have to. The man who follows him learns what going first actually looks like: not charging ahead, but absorbing cost before someone else has to carry it.

Save this one. Send it to a man in your corner.

#christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #faithoverfear #leadership #disciplineequalsfreedom #masculinity #christianity #scripture #faith
theme: He leads by going first into the cost.
